title: lasianthus oligoneurus
intro: Lasianthus oligoneurus, also known as the Oligoneurous Lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is a shrub native to the subtropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and China, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus oligoneurus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, and it can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
